title: perilla frutescens var. nankinensis
intro: Perilla frutescens var. nankinensis, also known as Korean perilla or Chinese basil, is a plant species belonging to the mint family. It has been traditionally used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Perilla frutescens var. nankinensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as tea, oil, and powder, are commonly used in traditional medicine and are also available in modern supplements.
